title: Sweet Scents and Citrus Celebrations
story: Orange blossoms fill the air with their sweet perfume on June 27 during National Orange Blossom Day! People visit orange groves to smell the fragrant white flowers that will become juicy oranges. Many folks share photos of the delicate blooms on social media or make orange blossom tea and cookies to celebrate nature's amazing cycle from flower to fruit.
activity_question: What do orange blossoms eventually become?
follow_up_question: What other flowers can you think of that smell amazing?

title: Pineapple Power Day!
story: Every June 27, people across America celebrate National Pineapple Day by going absolutely pineapple crazy! Restaurants serve pineapple pizza, smoothie shops blend tropical drinks, and grocery stores stack golden pineapples in towering displays. Social media fills with pineapple photos, from upside-down cakes to grilled pineapple rings sizzling on backyard barbecues. Some families even wear pineapple-print shirts or decorate their homes with pineapple decorations to show their love for this spiky, sweet fruit. It's the perfect excuse to try pineapple on everything and discover why this tropical treat deserves its own special day!
activity_question: What do people often put pineapple on that's mentioned in the story?
bonus_fact: Pineapples were once so rare and expensive that people rented them for parties!

title: Shades of Fun: National Sunglasses Day
story: Cool cats everywhere put on their favorite shades on June 27 for National Sunglasses Day! People show off everything from classic aviators to wild rainbow frames, posting selfies and strutting down sidewalks like movie stars. Eye doctors love this day because it reminds everyone that sunglasses aren't just for looking awesome—they protect your eyes from harmful sun rays too. Some folks even let their pets join the fun with tiny doggy sunglasses!
activity_question: Besides looking cool, what important job do sunglasses do?
activity_choices: They protect your eyes from harmful sun rays
They help you see in the dark
activity_answer: They protect your eyes from harmful sun rays
follow_up_question: What's the wildest pair of sunglasses you've ever seen someone wear?

title: The World's Most Famous Birthday Song Gets Its Day
story: Every June 27, people celebrate Happy Birthday to You Day by honoring the most sung song in the world! This special day recognizes the tune that makes every birthday party complete. People celebrate by singing the famous song extra loud, sharing birthday memories on social media, and some even throw surprise parties for friends and family. Many schools and community centers host birthday-themed events where everyone gets to blow out candles together. Some people learn fun facts about the song's history or try singing it in different languages. It's amazing how four simple words and a catchy melody bring so much joy to celebrations everywhere!
activity_question: According to the story, what do people do on Happy Birthday to You Day?
activity_choices: Sing the birthday song extra loud and share memories
activity_answer: Sing the birthday song extra loud and share memories
follow_up_question: What other songs do you think deserve their own special day?

title: Cake Meets Ice Cream: Double Dessert Day!
story: Ice cream cake gets its own special day on June 27, and dessert lovers everywhere go absolutely wild! This amazing treat combines the best of both worlds - fluffy cake layers with creamy ice cream smooshed right in the middle. Bakeries and ice cream shops create extra-special flavors just for today, from chocolate fudge brownie to strawberry shortcake versions. Families celebrate by making their own ice cream cakes at home, layering store-bought ice cream between cake slices and freezing it overnight. Social media fills up with photos of these colorful, drippy masterpieces. Some people even eat ice cream cake for breakfast on June 27 - because why not celebrate properly?
activity_question: What do families often do at home to celebrate this holiday?
activity_choices: Make their own ice cream cakes by layering ingredients
Build ice cream snowmen in their freezers
Only buy cakes from expensive bakeries
Eat regular cake with a glass of milk instead
activity_answer: Make their own ice cream cakes by layering ingredients
bonus_fact: The first ice cream cake was invented in the 1870s by a creative baker!

title: Going Nuts for Mixed Nuts Day!
story: Every June 27, people celebrate National Mixed Nuts Day by munching on their favorite nutty combinations! Families crack open cans of mixed nuts filled with peanuts, cashews, almonds, and Brazil nuts. Some people host nut-tasting parties where everyone brings different varieties to share. Others bake cookies or make trail mix using their favorite nuts. Social media fills with photos of colorful nut bowls and homemade snack creations. It's the perfect day to go a little nuts!
activity_question: What do some people host on National Mixed Nuts Day?
bonus_fact: Peanuts aren't actually nuts - they're legumes that grow underground like beans!
